pages.text: Neko Technology adds two new ores to the world: Tin Ore and Aluminum Ore. You won't be able to process these ores early on, but feel free to stockpile them!

pages.title: Tin Ore
pages.text: Tin Ore can be found between Y=-24 and Y=70 in the Overworld. Mine it with an iron pickaxe or better. Tin is quite common, with veins typically containing 4 to 12 blocks.

pages.title: Aluminum Ore
pages.text: Aluminum Ore can be found between Y=-24 and Y=12 in the Overworld. Mine it with an iron pickaxe or better. Aluminum is quite rare, with veins typically containing only 1 to 2 blocks.
